_meta.description: Curated Indian Evidence Act (1872) -> BSA (Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023) correspondence for commonly cited evidence provisions.
_meta.transition_rule: Evidence in proceedings on or after 2024-07-01 is governed by the BSA. Matters/proceedings before that date continue under the Indian Evidence Act, 1872.
_meta.source: Compiled from publicly published IEA<->BSA correspondence tables (MHA / legislative summaries).
_meta.verification_note: VERIFY every entry against the official Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023 bare act before relying on it.

8.offence: Motive, preparation and previous or subsequent conduct

25.offence: Confession to a police officer not provable
25.note: Related discovery rule (IEA 27) folds into BSA 23(2).

32.offence: Statements by a person who is dead or cannot be found (incl. dying declaration)

114.offence: Court may presume existence of certain facts
